_instructions: HOW TO ADD A NEW AIRCRAFT MOD:
1. Copy this file and rename it to your aircraft (e.g. F-15E.json)
3. The 'type' field MUST match the mod's DCS internal type string exactly
4. To find the type string: create a mission with the mod in the DCS editor,
save it, rename the .miz to .zip, extract, open the 'mission' file in a
text editor, and search for your aircraft — the 'type' value is what you need
5. Loadout CLSIDs can be found the same way — look in the pylons section
6. If you don't know the CLSIDs, leave pylons empty — the aircraft will still
work, it just won't have pre-configured weapons (DCS will use defaults)
7. Performance numbers don't need to be exact — ballpark is fine
8. Aliases are what you can type to select this aircraft (e.g. 'raptor', 'f-22')
9. Delete all lines starting with '_' before using (they're just comments)
